title: Phase 144 — No-Refresh Browser Submission Lock + OneDrive Inbox Sync Guard v1
purpose: Prevent browser refresh/resubmission from interrupting ChatGPT prompt entry/generation and add OneDrive command inbox hydration/stability guards before phone JSON commands are accepted.

symptoms: Artifact watcher refreshed/retried while the prompt was still being typed or generation had not completed.
Phase 143 prompt began typing but did not reliably submit or download an artifact.
Hotfix requests duplicated instead of producing a single stable download route.
OneDrive command inbox did not appear hydrated locally until opened by the owner.

acceptanceCriteria: Phone command intake waits for a fully-local, stable JSON file before accepting the command.
A command receives exactly one prompt-submission attempt unless explicitly retried by a new owner command id.
Artifact watcher never refreshes the ChatGPT page while prompt typing, submission, generation, or download lease is active.
Duplicate submission or duplicate generation is recorded as BLOCKED/NEEDS_ATTENTION instead of continuing silently.
Download success requires the expected ZIP filename to exist, be stable, and be routed with evidence.
Blocked handoff includes enough context to continue the same conversation safely.
